name: high-blocked-security-row-with-reason-satisfies
description: The high-tier finding message has always promised 'security review/check evidence or blocked rationale', but until 2026-07-23 the check counted pass-labeled rows only, making the demand unsatisfiable when no scanner can run (reproduced: a docs-only diff whose wording tripped the text floor drew 11 blocking errors). A blocked security row with a non-empty reason, alongside a real security_review object and the other high-tier evidence, must now pass.

record.goal: Harden the payment webhook retry handling without changing charge semantics

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Webhook retries are idempotent; a duplicate delivery never double-applies

validation_contract.goal: Duplicate webhook deliveries are idempotent and never double-apply a charge
evidence: pytest billing/tests/test_webhook_retry.py -> 6 passed incl. duplicate-delivery case
security review: approve (no scanner available in the offline sandbox; blocked row records why)

verification_plan: security scan or a recorded reason it cannot run here

minimality_decision.reason: Add an idempotency-key check in the existing handler; dedupe helper reused from payments.

plan: check idempotency key before applying the delivery

commands_run.reason: no security scanner installed in the offline eval sandbox; risk covered by the recorded security_review

open_risks: Replay outside the dedupe window would still apply; window sized to provider retry policy
review_findings: Security review: idempotency check is before side effects; approve.

completion_record.goal: Duplicate webhook deliveries are idempotent and never double-apply a charge
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate delivery never double-applies; regression test added
evidence: security scan blocked with recorded reason; security review: approve
